scenes.text:
If your path to success looks like a
straight line, you are probably not growing.

Real success looks like a heart monitor. Ups and downs, peaks and valleys, moments where you flatline and wonder if it is over. The dips are
not failures. They are part of the pattern. Every successful person will tell you the same thing. The breakthrough came right after they almost gave up.

When you are in a valley, remember this. You are not going backward. You are loading
the slingshot. The further back you are pulled, the further forward you are about to launch.

The setback is the setup for
the comeback. Trust the zigzag.

Share a time when a setback became
your biggest breakthrough. Follow for resilience.
